title: Official SSLG General Assembly for Student Leaders
summary: All class officers, club presidents, and committee heads are requested to attend the SSLG General Assembly for updates on leadership priorities, organizational protocols, and school-wide activity coordination.

title: Campus Clean and Green Initiative Launch
summary: The SSLG will formally launch its school-based Clean and Green Initiative to strengthen learner participation in campus cleanliness, waste segregation, and shared responsibility for the school environment.

title: Learner Welfare and Peer Support Week
summary: A coordinated week of learner-centered activities will be conducted to promote school belonging, student well-being, respectful interaction, and peer support across grade levels.

title: Call for Student Organization Project Proposals
summary: Recognized student organizations are invited to submit project proposals aligned with leadership development, academic support, school values formation, outreach, and inclusive campus participation.

title: Official Advisory on Leadership Orientation
summary: Incoming and newly designated student leaders will participate in an orientation on SSLG procedures, official communication, event planning standards, and leadership responsibilities.

title: School Pride and Values Campaign Opening
summary: The SSLG will begin a values and school pride campaign highlighting respect, discipline, participation, and responsible conduct through class-based information drives and visibility materials.
